programs.title: Frasier
programs.desc: Frasier and Niles encounter bullies from their school days, but both approach the awkward reunion very differently.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Leonard and Howard are furious when they learn that Sheldon went to work with the military behind their backs. Angered, the pair ask Kripke to help them get their own back on Sheldon, much to his annoyance. Meanwhile, Bernadette suspects that Ruchi might be trying to steal her job while she is on bed rest, so she asks Raj to investigate for her, putting him in a very awkward position. Dean Norris guest stars.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Sheldon tries to teach the other guys a lesson after they cut him out of a potentially valuable Bitcoin investment seven years ago.

programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One With The Late Thanksgiving
programs.desc: Monica reluctantly agrees to cook Thanksgiving dinner, but locks everyone out when they turn up late as Joey and Ross went to a hockey game while Rachel and Phoebe took Emma to a baby beauty contest. Monica also receives some adoption news.

programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One With The Birth Mother
programs.desc: Monica and Chandler are forced to pretend to be a reverend and a doctor when their prospective child's birth mother gets the wrong end of the stick. Meanwhile, Joey's date with Phoebe's friend doesn't go well, and Ross is left with an inappropriate outfit for a date with a sexy salesgirl.

programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
programs.desc: When Rachel and Phoebe catch Chandler getting into a car with a blonde woman, they assume he is having an affair.
